## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Promptfoo and GrowthX to discuss content marketing progress and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/pJdyue_TjaNU1p68TFHJffwxwT67e8dT?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX refined knowledge base for improved tone alignment](https://fathom.video/share/pJdyue_TjaNU1p68TFHJffwxwT67e8dT?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Promptfoo team currently swamped with go-to-market activities; limited bandwidth for content review](https://fathom.video/share/pJdyue_TjaNU1p68TFHJffwxwT67e8dT?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [GrowthX actively hiring to support more technical clients](https://fathom.video/share/pJdyue_TjaNU1p68TFHJffwxwT67e8dT?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Agreement to pause new content creation for a week, focusing on review of existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/pJdyue_TjaNU1p68TFHJffwxwT67e8dT?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
